summary: Iteration 40b — Burnout Forecasting fully verified. All 9 iter40b backend tests PASS + 23/23 regression on iter38 + iter40 PASS (32/32 total). Frontend manager flow verified end-to-end at /staff-operations?tab=wellbeing: BurnoutForecastPanel renders, privacy notice visible, 3 staff cards (all Steady), explanation modal opens with factor chain + recommended actions + close button. RBAC verified — staff (tier 1) and senior (tier 2) do NOT see Team Wellbeing tab nor BurnoutForecastPanel even via direct URL (?tab=wellbeing). Existing TeamWellbeingAwareness card still renders below burnout panel. No backend or frontend issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: BurnoutForecastPanel.jsx is well-scoped (~320 lines) with three internal subcomponents (SummaryPill, StaffCard, BurnoutExplanationModal, FactorRow) — readable and focused. No split needed.
Privacy boundary is enforced at API level (verified by seeding token-laced reflection then asserting absence in /api/intelligence/burnout-forecast response).
Determinism verified: two consecutive GET calls return identical (staff_id, risk, score) tuples.
Score math verified: sum(factor.weight) clamped at 0 == staff.score for every staff row.
Tone test passes: labels strictly in {Steady, Pressure increasing, Support recommended} — no punitive language.
seed_data_creation: Iter40b test seeds a private reflection with unique token 'ZZZ_SECRET_DIARY_TOKEN_BURNOUT_TEST_OMICRON' to verify privacy boundary (token must not appear in burnout-forecast payload). Test passes — token absent.
verified_features: GET /api/intelligence/burnout-forecast — 200 for manager (tier 3) and admin (tier 4), 403 for staff (tier 1) and senior (tier 2)
Payload shape: generated_at, overall_status in (stable|watch|support_recommended|high_pressure), summary{high,medium,low,total_staff}, config, staff[], privacy_notice (with 'aggregate' substring)

Staff card shape: staff_id, name, role, risk in (low|medium|high), label, score (non-negative int), top_factors (≤2), factors (each with label/weight/domain), recommended_actions (≥1), signals_summary (only numeric values)
Determinism — two consecutive calls return identical (staff_id, risk, score) tuples
Summary counts equal actual bucket counts in staff[]
Privacy boundary — payload never echoes private reflection body/title text (verified with unique seeded token)
Supportive tone — labels never contain 'burnt', 'failing', 'broken', 'incompetent'; only in {Steady, Pressure increasing, Support recommended}
Factor math — sum of factor weights (clamped ≥ 0) equals row score
Frontend /staff-operations?tab=wellbeing as manager: burnout-panel renders, burnout-privacy-notice visible, burnout-count-low pill shows '3 Steady', 3 burnout-staff-<id> cards render
Clicking staff card opens burnout-explanation-modal with burnout-factor-chain, burnout-recommended-actions, burnout-explanation-close (close working)
Existing TeamWellbeingAwareness card still renders below the burnout panel
Wellbeing tab hidden in HubTabs for staff (tier 1) and senior (tier 2) — direct URL /staff-operations?tab=wellbeing falls back; burnout-panel and team-wellbeing-panel both absent
Regression iter40 (8/8): forecast endpoints, resident stability list/single, sorts by severity, adult vs children engine separation
Regression iter38 (15/15): live staffing overview, ratios, RBAC, clock-in/out lifecycle, leave, shift swaps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter40b verified end-to-end. Burnout forecast is deterministic and aggregate-only — confirmed safe for production. Demo data currently produces 3 Steady staff (no Pressure/Support yet) — main agent may want to add a seeded high-pressure staff for visual demo of medium/high pills. Public URL: https://safeguard-dash-1.preview.emergentagent.com. IMPORTANT for next testing agent: pytest needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported in shell env (e.g. `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://safeguard-dash-1.preview.emergentagent.com`) before running tests, otherwise all iter*.py tests error out with MissingSchema.
